use: NEXT.io relief, boundaries, ownership, executive visibility, HubSpot governance, Monday.com delivery backbone.
when_to_open: Open when the task is about saying no, delegating, follow-up, Jo ownership, executive notes, meeting hygiene or internal standards.
when_not_to_open: Do not use for public content, Strait Up Growth offer design, or AI tool scouting.
first_files: README_START_HERE.md, CLAUDE.md, Work_Intake_Rules.md, Stop_Doing_Register.md, Ownership_Map.md, Decision_Rights_Register.md, Weekly_Executive_Script.md, HubSpot_Governance_Rules.md, Jo_Task_Brief_Template.md
privacy: Contains internal-work context. Avoid pasting staff performance or sensitive CRM data into external tools.

use: Commercial judgement, pricing, GTM, forecasting, target-setting, sales strategy review.
when_to_open: Open when the task involves pricing, forecasting, GTM readiness, revenue targets, discount logic, commercial coaching or proof base.
when_not_to_open: Do not use for generic motivation, content brainstorming or Mandarin practice.
first_files: README.md, pricing scorecards, GTM scorecards, strategy teardown template, scheduled pricing judgement coach.
privacy: Use anonymised numbers unless the target model/tool is approved for confidential commercial data.

use: Offer, positioning, website audit, discovery calls, outreach, proof, proposal and client delivery.
when_to_open: Open for Strait Up Growth website, market validation, outreach, client proof, Growth Review packaging and case studies.
when_not_to_open: Do not use to solve NEXT.io internal execution unless turning lessons into public proof without confidential detail.
first_files: positioning, offer architecture, discovery call framework, proposal framework, case study framework.
privacy: Do not include client names or sensitive client workflows unless permission is clear.

use: LinkedIn, public voice, network building, speaking angles, commentary, content extraction.
when_to_open: Open when writing posts, finding opinions, planning speaking angles, or building your Singapore relationship map.
when_not_to_open: Do not use for internal NEXT.io governance or private commercial data.
first_files: content pillars, work-led post template, public safe insight extractor, speaker bio, podcast angle bank.
privacy: Public posts should be anonymised and never leak internal NEXT.io details.

use: Model routing, prompt quality, AI evaluation, tool testing, manual-before-agent logic, AI tech scout.
when_to_open: Open when choosing models, testing tools, judging output quality, building prompts, or deciding if something deserves automation.
when_not_to_open: Do not use as an excuse to compare models endlessly.
first_files: model router, quality gate, prompt rules, no more LLM loop, tool choice gate.
privacy: Model tests should use dummy or anonymised examples unless data is safe.

use: Business Mandarin tied to Singapore relationships, Strait Up Growth, pricing, growth, operations and AI.
when_to_open: Open for Mandarin scripts, founder roleplays, business vocabulary and Singapore relationship practice.
when_not_to_open: Do not use for generic language learning disconnected from your goals.
privacy: No special privacy risk unless using real client or staff names.

use: Mining previous useful outputs and artifacts, not validating strategy forever.
when_to_open: Open only when looking for a prior prompt, artifact, dashboard or wording you already created.
when_not_to_open: Do not use for another strategy loop.
first_files: old outputs, dashboards and previous Claude project material.
privacy: Treat as a mixed source pack. Check before sharing externally.

use: Career proof, compensation narrative, LinkedIn authority, Singapore positioning, credibility.
when_to_open: Open when updating your proof base, compensation narrative, founder story or profile positioning.
when_not_to_open: Do not use as a substitute for market validation.
first_files: CV, proof metrics, role achievements, APAC experience, revenue infrastructure examples.
privacy: Safe for public positioning once reviewed.

asset: NEXT.io Live Artifact Specs Execution Source Pack
use: Use when converting Leadership Time Reclaim outputs into P1 live artifacts, Claude Cowork source reviews, scheduled task candidates, and later automation specs.
when_to_open: Open when the active task is one of the five P1 artifact builds: routing map, intake brief, decision log, pricing rule card, or GTM readiness gate.
when_not_to_open: Do not open for general strategy, self-coaching, personal brand, Chinese, or broad automation ideas. Do not import the 41 roadmap-feed items into the active queue.
first_files: source-packs/nextio-live-artifacts-summary.md, relevant prompts/live-artifacts file, Source Rules from execution source pack
privacy: Use evidence summaries only. Do not upload raw emails, CRM exports, staff performance details, PIP content, client data, compensation, or sensitive commercial information to GitHub.
